scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @gridra/core && npm run build -w @gridra/react && npm run build -w @gridra/table-reference
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @gridra/demo
scripts.api:update: npm run build:packages && npm run api:update:reports
scripts.api:update:reports: api-extractor run --local -c packages/core/api-extractor.json && api-extractor run --local -c packages/react/api-extractor.json
scripts.api:check: npm run build:packages && npm run api:check:reports
scripts.api:check:reports: api-extractor run -c packages/core/api-extractor.json && api-extractor run -c packages/react/api-extractor.json
scripts.size:check: npm run build:packages && npm run size:check:no-build
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run api:check:reports && npm run package:audit && npm run size:check:no-build
scripts.release:verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:packages && npm run api:check:reports && npm run package:audit && npm run size:check:no-build
scripts.release: npm run release:verify && npm run release:publish
